primary_trigger_condition: 15M candle CLOSE below 4432 support confirms breakdown; enter short on next candle open around 4428. Do NOT enter before PCE release (~12:30 UTC). Wait for post-PCE structure to confirm direction.
primary_entry_signal: 15M bearish close below 4432 with momentum; ideally a bearish engulfing or marubozu on the breakdown candle; RSI below 50 on 15M
flip_trigger_condition: Price holds above 4432 or bounces from 4430-4440 demand zone with 15M bullish reversal candle. PRIMARY SHORT must be invalidated (no close below 4432) or price reverses sharply back above 4432 after brief break. Activate after PCE data confirms cooler-than-expected reading.
flip_entry_signal: 15M bullish engulfing or hammer/pin bar at 4430-4440 demand zone; RSI turning up from oversold territory; MACD histogram reducing bearish momentum on 15M
notes: HIGH-IMPACT EVENT: April PCE data releases today ~12:30 UTC. BofA forecast: headline PCE 0.4% m/m (3.8% y/y), core PCE 0.3% m/m (3.3% y/y). Hot PCE = hawkish = bearish gold (PRIMARY SHORT favored). Cool PCE = rate cut hopes = bullish gold (FLIP LONG favored). AVOID entering within 30 min before PCE release. Iran Strait of Hormuz ceasefire commitment reducing geopolitical premium. Section 122 tariffs under court appeal (expires Jul 24). New Fed Chair Warsh (hawkish) in place after Powell May 2026 exit. EU auto tariffs deadline Jul 4. Gold in confirmed downtrend from 4773 May high. Min lot forces PRIMARY risk to exactly 20% cap — acceptable per rules. S&P 500 ~7520, Nasdaq ~26674, risk-on environment pressuring gold. DXY ~99.19. US10Y ~4.48-4.50%. Margin note: 0.01 lot at ~4430 requires ~$8.86 margin, free margin ~$91.
